name: Mint Candy-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the confectioners' sugar and softened butter until combined.
2. Gradually add milk, stirring continuously until the mixture reaches a workable consistency.
3. Add peppermint extract and food coloring to taste, then stir gently.
4. Roll small amounts of the mixture into balls.
5. Flatten each ball on wax paper.
6. Leave on wax paper overnight to set.
This is a fun and easy cooking activity to do with young children.
